title: sempervivum × lineatum
intro: Sempervivum × lineatum, also known as the living stone or hens and chicks, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. The plant is known for its thick, fleshy leaves and stems that can store water, allowing it to survive in dry conditions. Sempervivum × lineatum has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can provide various health benefits, such as soothing skin issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
